title: Hemionitis selinoides
taxonomy: Hemionitis selinoides is classified within the family Dryopteridaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the wood ferns or scaly male ferns. This classification is based on its morphological and phylogenetic characteristics. The genus Hemionitis is part of the order Polypodiales, which comprises various species of ferns that are native to different parts of the world. The species Hemionitis selinoides is also known by other names, such as Blechnum selinoides and Blechnum serrulatum, which may reflect its varying classification across different taxonomic systems. Further research may be necessary to confirm the exact classification of Hemionitis selinoides.
